title: Senior Insights Consultant Marketing Analytics FMCG (m/w/d) - Talent Pool
required_skills: Data analysis / insight or data management background
Good knowledge of Media channels and how advertising works
matched_skills: Data analysis, reporting, and customer insights
C-level data storytelling / cross-functional team coordination
core_responsibilities: Lead teams to leverage data and analysis to make concise and compelling recommendations to FMCG clients
Manage end-to-end delivery of Media & Analytics projects including scope, quality checks, and timeline tracking
Act as key liaison between data scientists, insights analysts, and commercial teams to ensure delivery quality
Build and deliver impactful client presentations interpreting machine learning data analysis results
Lead client workshops as a trusted advisor and develop new perspectives to accelerate client growth
recommended_emphasis: Highlight EMEA/APAC multi-market coverage and international stakeholder experience
Emphasize data storytelling and executive presentation skills (C-level dashboards, executive-ready reports)
Showcase project management and cross-functional coordination experience (HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd)
Frame customer insights and segmentation work in terms of actionable business recommendations
Stress any exposure to retail/CPG/e-commerce data or market intelligence to bridge FMCG gap
